channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Constant dog fouling without being cleaned up, 18th March
item.description:
I walk along this route quite regularly and without fail there is always dog excrement on the pavement in 3 or 4 places. Deliberately left, It must be happening every day. This is a popular walking area especially during school time. I think this an easy be stopped if nits happening on a daily basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Avenue, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged bollard, 18th March
item.description:
Knocked down, leaving hole and displaced paving slab

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aristotle Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose BT manhole, 18th March
item.description:
Loose BT manhole

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Church Street, Woolwich

item.title: Mattress and other items left, 18th March
item.description:
Councillor sizer ward councillor for Hoxton east

item.title: Damaged bollard, 18th March
item.description:
Been driven over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gauden Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves, 18th March
item.description:
A build up of leaves which look a mess and become very slippery when wet. It appears it hasn’t been swept for many months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Displaced paving slab, 18th March
item.description:
Trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and pallets next to communal wheelie bins. In the past you take the view that this is on private land, but actually it is because you provide wheelie bins on private land and so it is not the landowners job to dispose of fly tipped waste., 18th March
item.description:
I am a neighbour who spends time clearing up fly tipping in this location, but the size of the currently dumped material is beyond my capabilities as a retired person. please help!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 162, Camberwell Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree to be pruned, 18th March
item.description:
Please can the tree be pruned back, it is impeding pedestrian access

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streatham Common North, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zipline broken, 18th March
item.description:
The zip line has either broken or been damaged but is not usable as is on floor

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Oaks, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th March

Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merganser Gardens, Thamesmead

item.title: Leaves need clearing, 18th March
item.description:
This problem is not fixed. It has been reported on 2 previous occasions.Leaves are building up along the boundary of 73.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking blocking safe cycle access, 18th March
item.description:
Please can you put some bollards up to stop ice cream vans parking in this spot illegally. The van obscures the road for cycles and cars. Please put a stop to this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevada Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Household items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvedon Hall Lane, Kelvedon Hatch, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
For some reason people seem to think that outside our house - 27 Cassland Road, is an unofficial rubbish tip. Can we get this taken away and a council sign that says no fly tipping please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog foul around sign pole 46A5 on Alexandra Cres, 18th March
item.description:
Repeated fouling and unsightly mess for months.There is a clear do not foul sign & picture posted on pole 46A5
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
